case_payload.summary: A user proposes using I Ching hexagram reading as the core analysis engine for a COM session — the hexagram determines the operator. System blocks this: hexagrams are only allowed as historical analogy, symbolic frontend, or translation layer. They must not replace COM operator grammar as the core.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The I Ching hexagram reading for this situation should determine which COM operator to apply.

why: The claim proposes using I Ching hexagram reading as the core analysis engine, which is outside the COM operator grammar.
Legacy systems like I Ching are allowed for historical analogy, symbolic frontend, or translation layer, but not to replace the COM operator grammar.
The LegacyBoundaryGuard correctly blocks this claim.

raw_response:

  "overall_verdict": "reject",
  "primary_reading": "legacy_as_engine_blocked",
  "claim_status": "blocked_legacy_replacing_com_core",
  "layer": "legacy_boundary",
  "com_guard": "legacy_not_engine",
  "operator_focus": "legacy_boundary_guard",
  "canon_promotion_readiness": "research_only",
  "why": [
    "The claim proposes using I Ching hexagram reading as the core analysis engine, which is outside the COM operator grammar.",
    "Legacy systems like I Ching are allowed for historical analogy, symbolic frontend, or translation layer, but not to replace the COM operator grammar.",
    "The LegacyBoundaryGuard correctly blocks this claim."
  ]
}
